## Summary


## Area

- [ ] SDK-only Apache-2.0 surface
- [ ] Developer Edition / devkit restricted surface
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / release / packaging

## Public Contribution Safety

- [ ] I did not include secrets, tokens, customer data, private URLs, production
      logs, personal data, or sensitive environment details.
- [ ] I did not include proprietary third-party code or material I cannot
      contribute.
- [ ] I understand external contributions are not accepted until KSwitch enables
      an approved DCO, CLA, or no-external-contributions workflow.

## Licence Boundary

- [ ] SDK-only changes remain Apache-2.0 compatible.
- [ ] Developer Edition/devkit changes do not imply commercial-use rights,
      production rights, or open-source licensing.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_legal_boundary.py` passes when legal/licence
      surfaces are touched.
